# PartyPopper

## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::PartyPopper;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        PartyPopper { size: 20, color: "red" }
    }
}
```

emoji, congratulations, celebration, party, tada, 🎉, 🎊, excitement, exciting, excites, confetti
